result:
**Goal: Add a Visual Post-Processing Pipeline — composable ASCII visual effects that layer on top of ANY simulation mode.**

This would be a horizontal feature adding a chain of stackable terminal-space effects like bloom/glow, motion trails, edge detection, color cycling, scanlines, and CRT-style distortion. Toggled via hotkey, users could combine effects (e.g., edge-detect + glow + trails) to transform the look of any of the 100+ existing modes without changing them.

This is strategic because it's the rare feature that multiplies the value of *everything already built* rather than adding one more leaf mode. It also pairs naturally with the Cinematic Demo Reel for stunning screensaver visuals.

Want me to build it?
